Field.Label: Native Indigo Z-Wave Device
Field.Description: Select the existing Indigo device for this sensor — the Z-Wave node ID is read from it automatically.

Field.Label: Endpoint ID
Field.Description: Optional. For multi-channel devices only: enter the endpoint number (1, 2, 3...). Leave blank or 0 to accept all endpoints.

Field.Label: Native Indigo Z-Wave Device
Field.Description: Select the existing Indigo device for this sensor — the Z-Wave node ID is read from it automatically.

Field.Label: Endpoint ID
Field.Description: Optional. For multi-channel devices only: enter the endpoint number (1, 2, 3...). Leave blank or 0 to accept all endpoints.

Field.Label: Native Indigo Z-Wave Device
Field.Description: Select the existing Indigo device for this sensor — the Z-Wave node ID is read from it automatically.

Field.Label: Endpoint ID
Field.Description: Optional. For multi-channel devices only: enter the endpoint number (1, 2, 3...). Leave blank or 0 to accept all endpoints.

Field.Label: Native Indigo Z-Wave Device
Field.Description: Select the existing Indigo device for this sensor — the Z-Wave node ID is read from it automatically.

Field.Label: Endpoint ID
Field.Description: Optional. For multi-channel devices only: enter the endpoint number (1, 2, 3...). Leave blank or 0 to accept all endpoints.

Field.Label: Native Indigo Z-Wave Device
Field.Description: Select the existing Indigo device for this sensor — the Z-Wave node ID is read from it automatically.

Field.Label: Endpoint ID
Field.Description: Optional. For multi-channel devices only: enter the endpoint number (1, 2, 3...). Leave blank or 0 to accept all endpoints.

Field.Label: Native Indigo Z-Wave Device
Field.Description: Select the existing Indigo device for this sensor — the Z-Wave node ID is read from it automatically.

Field.Label: Endpoint ID
Field.Description: Optional. For multi-channel devices only: enter the endpoint number (1, 2, 3...). Leave blank or 0 to accept all endpoints.

Field.Label: Native Indigo Z-Wave Device
Field.Description: Select the existing Indigo device for this sensor — the Z-Wave node ID is read from it automatically.

Field.Label: Endpoint ID
Field.Description: Optional. For multi-channel devices only: enter the endpoint number (1, 2, 3...). Leave blank or 0 to accept all endpoints.

Field.Label: Native Indigo Z-Wave Device
Field.Description: Select the existing Indigo device for this sensor — the Z-Wave node ID is read from it automatically.

Field.Label: Endpoint ID
Field.Description: Optional. For multi-channel devices only: enter the endpoint number (1, 2, 3...). Leave blank or 0 to accept all endpoints.

Field.Label: Native Indigo Z-Wave Device
Field.Description: Select the existing Indigo device for this sensor — the Z-Wave node ID is read from it automatically.

Field.Label: Endpoint ID
Field.Description: Optional. For multi-channel devices only: enter the endpoint number (1, 2, 3...). Leave blank or 0 to accept all endpoints.

Field.Label: Native Indigo Z-Wave Device
Field.Description: Select the existing Indigo device for this sensor — the Z-Wave node ID is read from it automatically.

Field.Label: Endpoint ID
Field.Description: Optional. For multi-channel devices only: enter the endpoint number (1, 2, 3...). Leave blank or 0 to accept all endpoints.

Field.Label: Native Indigo Z-Wave Device
Field.Description: Select the existing Indigo device for this sensor — the Z-Wave node ID is read from it automatically. For a multi-sensor, create one plugin device per sensor type and select the same native device for each.

Field.Label: Sensor Type
Field.Description: Sets the icon and primary display value shown in the device list

Field.Label: Endpoint ID
Field.Description: Optional. For multi-channel devices only: enter the endpoint number (1, 2, 3...) this device should listen on. Leave blank or 0 to accept all endpoints.
